variants.name: 睡鼠
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，如果你在今天白天没有发起提名和投票，你可以选择一名玩家：他醉酒直到下个黄昏。
variants.otherNightReminder: If the Dormouse did not nominate or vote today they choose a player they are drunk. :reminder:
variants.flavor: You might just as well say, ” added the Dormouse, who seemed to be talking in his sleep, “that ‘I breathe when I sleep’ is the same thing as ‘I sleep when I breathe’!
